story_summary: Boxwell quietly repairs the Brambled Inn's kitchen regulator without payment, earning the lasting trust of Mirel, the innkeeper.

entities.summary: A patient travelling clockmaker who carries a cedar case of tools.
entities.evidence_excerpt: she found Boxwell at the workbench anyway

entities.summary: The discreet innkeeper of the Brambled Inn.
entities.evidence_excerpt: Mirel kept the Brambled Inn the way her mother had.

claims.evidence_excerpt: the innkeeper Mirel trusted Boxwell's discretion entirely
Mirel kept the Brambled Inn the way her mother had.

chunks.title: Mirel and Boxwell
chunks.body: The innkeeper Mirel trusts Boxwell's discretion after he repaired the kitchen regulator without asking payment.

chunks.title: Continuity: The Kitchen Regulator
chunks.body: Previous story summary: Boxwell repaired the Brambled Inn's kitchen regulator for free, and Mirel now keeps the corner room ready for him.
